ValidationRule.description: Nur HR darf Job Title eines Mitarbeitenden ändern
ValidationRule.errorConditionFormula: AND( $User.PS480FunctionValidationRulesActive__c =true, $User.IsHRManager__c = false, RecordTypeId = "012b0000000bub1", OR( ISCHANGED( JobTitle__c ), ISNEW() ) )
ValidationRule.errorMessage: You are not allowed to change your Job Title. Please get in touch with HR. (CO006)
